title_en: Fauna and Flora Protection Ordinance — Wildlife regulation (Gazette 2473/26)
title_si: වන සත්ව සහ වෘක්ෂලතා ආරක්ෂණ ආඥා පනත (469 වන අධිකාරිය) - වන ජීවී නියාමන
title_ta: தாவர, விலங்கினப் பாதுகாப்புக் கட்டளைச் சட்டம் (அதிகாரம் 469) - வனவிலங்கு ஒழுங்குமுறை
summary_en: Regulation under the Fauna and Flora Protection Ordinance (Chapter 469), typically designating a managed reserve (e.g. Elephant Managed Reserve) and imposing land-use and development controls within the area.
